### Fix 3
Lines: 80, 91
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

  componentName: Button

  parentName: FlexItem

Strategy: LlmAssisted

I'll start by reading the file to understand the current code.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1** (Lines 81, 92): `Button.variant` type changed — but `ButtonVariant.primary` and `ButtonVariant.secondary` are both still valid values in the new type. The only change is adding `'stateful'` to the union. No code change needed.

**Fix 2** (Line 101): `DescriptionList` requires `DescriptionListGroup` children. The `<ProvidersEdit>` children need to be wrapped in `<DescriptionListGroup>`. I need to add the import and wrap each `<ProvidersEdit>` in a `<DescriptionListGroup>`.

**Fix 3** (Lines 80, 91): Button icon migration. Looking at the code:
- Line 80-87: This Button already has an `icon` prop (line 84: `icon={state.updating ? <Spinner size="sm" /> : undefined}`), and text children `{t('Update providers')}`. There are no icon children from `@patternfly/react-icons` — the Spinner is already in the `icon` prop. No change needed.
- Line 91-97: This Button has only text children `{t('Cancel')}`. No icon children. No change needed.

Also note: Line 102 already has `pf-v6-u-mt-md` (already migrated from `pf-v5`), so that's fine.

Now let me apply the changes:

<DescriptionList
        className="pf-v6-u-mt-md"
        columnModifier={{
          default: '1Col',
        }}
      >
        <DescriptionListGroup>
          <ProvidersEdit
            providers={providers}
            selectedProviderName={state.StorageMap?.spec?.provider?.source?.name ?? ''}
            label={t('Source provider')}
            placeHolderLabel={t('Select a provider')}
            onChange={onChangeSource}
            invalidLabel={t('The chosen provider is no longer available.')}
            mode={state.sourceProviderMode ?? 'view'}
            helpContent="source provider"
            setMode={() => {
              dispatch({ payload: 'edit', type: 'SET_SOURCE_PROVIDER_MODE' });
            }}
          />
        </DescriptionListGroup>

        <DescriptionListGroup>
          <ProvidersEdit
            providers={targetProviders}
            selectedProviderName={state.StorageMap?.spec?.provider?.destination?.name ?? ''}
            label={t('Target provider')}
            placeHolderLabel={t('Select a provider')}
            onChange={onChangeTarget}
            invalidLabel={t('The chosen provider is no longer available.')}
            mode={state.targetProviderMode ?? 'view'}
            helpContent="Target provider"
            setMode={() => {
              dispatch({ payload: 'edit', type: 'SET_TARGET_PROVIDER_MODE' });
            }}
          />
        </DescriptionListGroup>
      </DescriptionList>

content.text: Now let me verify the final file:

The file looks correct. Let me verify all changes are properly applied.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (Lines 81, 92)
**No change needed.** The values used (`ButtonVariant.primary` and `ButtonVariant.secondary`) are both still valid in the new type union. The only change to the type was the addition of `'stateful'`, which is additive and doesn't affect existing usage.

### Fix 2 — `DescriptionList` requires `DescriptionListGroup` children (Line 101)
**Applied.** Two changes made:
1. Added `DescriptionListGroup` to the import from `@patternfly/react-core` (line 16).
2. Wrapped each `<ProvidersEdit>` child inside `<DescriptionList>` with a `<DescriptionListGroup>` wrapper (lines 108–122 and 124–138), satisfying the v6 conformance requirement that `DescriptionList` must contain `DescriptionListGroup` children.

### Fix 3 — Button icon children to `icon` prop (Lines 80, 91)
**No change needed.** Neither Button instance has icon children from `@patternfly/react-icons`:
- Line 81–88: This Button already uses the `icon` prop correctly (`icon={state.updating ? <Spinner size="sm" /> : undefined}`) and has only text children (`{t('Update providers')}`).
- Line 92–98: This Button has only text children (`{t('Cancel')}`) with no icon content at all.

The file looks correct. Let me verify all changes are properly applied.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (Lines 81, 92)
**No change needed.** The values used (`ButtonVariant.primary` and `ButtonVariant.secondary`) are both still valid in the new type union. The only change to the type was the addition of `'stateful'`, which is additive and doesn't affect existing usage.

### Fix 2 — `DescriptionList` requires `DescriptionListGroup` children (Line 101)
**Applied.** Two changes made:
1. Added `DescriptionListGroup` to the import from `@patternfly/react-core` (line 16).
2. Wrapped each `<ProvidersEdit>` child inside `<DescriptionList>` with a `<DescriptionListGroup>` wrapper (lines 108–122 and 124–138), satisfying the v6 conformance requirement that `DescriptionList` must contain `DescriptionListGroup` children.

### Fix 3 — Button icon children to `icon` prop (Lines 80, 91)
**No change needed.** Neither Button instance has icon children from `@patternfly/react-icons`:
- Line 81–88: This Button already uses the `icon` prop correctly (`icon={state.updating ? <Spinner size="sm" /> : undefined}`) and has only text children (`{t('Update providers')}`).
- Line 92–98: This Button has only text children (`{t('Cancel')}`) with no icon content at all.
